title: Lifesteal999
description: Battle for survival in this customizable lifesteal plugin featuring heart stealing mechanics, hardcore elimination, combat logging protection, and full configuration control
body:
Lifesteal999 transforms your Minecraft server with intense PVP mechanics where players permanently steal hearts from their victims, featuring deep customization, hardcore elimination modes, and anti-exploit protections.

Core Features:

Heart Economy: Players lose hearts on death which transfer to killers (configurable between direct health transfer or item drops)
Hardcore Mode: Eliminated players become spectators until revived by admins
Item System: Custom heart items with NBT verification to prevent exploitation
Combat Protection: Punishes combat loggers with automatic heart deduction
Multi-World Support: Restrict mechanics to specific worlds
Visual Feedback: Particles, sounds, and customizable messages
Commands:

/withdraw <amount> - Convert hearts into items (requires lifesteal.withdraw)
/lifesteal reload - Reload configuration (admin)
/lifesteal give <player> <amount> - Give heart items (admin)
/lifesteal revive <player> - Restore eliminated players (admin)
Permissions:

lifesteal.withdraw - Allow heart withdrawal
lifesteal.admin - Full admin access
lifesteal.bypass - Immune to heart loss
Configuration:

Adjust maximum hearts (up to 1024 via attributes)
Toggle direct transfer vs. item drops
Customize heart item appearance
Set hardcore respawn thresholds
Modify combat logout punishment
Control visual effects and messages
